tooltip.wardenward.warden_ward: Prevent the warden from spawning in the world when equipped.
tooltip.wardenward.warden_xp_necklace: Give a 0.1% of the current level of exprecience when gaining xp.
tooltip.wardenward.warden_pulse_boots: Press the Warden Pulse Action key to execute the jump.
tooltip.wardenward.warden_sonic_pulse: Throw a sonic pulse at your enemies.
